.env.SAMPLE.general_idea: Add a placeholder for the Chromatic project token to the environment sample file.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch the base image from a Debian-based Maven/JDK 11 image to an Alpine-based Liberica JDK 21 image to support Java 21.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The application requires Java 21 features or compatibility; the old JDK 11 image does not provide the target runtime environment.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Replace Debian package manager (apt-get) with Alpine package manager (apk) for installing system dependencies.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The new base image is Alpine Linux, which uses apk instead of apt-get; using apt-get would fail at build time.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Install bash explicitly as it is not included by default in the minimal Alpine image.
Dockerfile.why_exists: Subsequent commands rely on bash (e.g., nvm installation script), which is missing in the default Alpine environment.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Install Maven explicitly since the new base image does not include it.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The build process requires Maven to compile the Java application, but the new JDK-only image lacks it.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Install libstdc++ to satisfy native library dependencies required by the application or tools.
Dockerfile.why_exists: Some Java native libraries or tools may require the C++ standard library, which is not present in the minimal Alpine image.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Replace the NodeSource setup script and apt-based Node.js installation with NVM for Node.js management.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The previous method relied on Debian-specific repositories and apt; NVM provides a portable way to install Node.js on Alpine.
Dockerfile.before: RUN apt-get install -y curl && curl -sL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_12.x | bash - && curl https://cli-assets.heroku.com/install-ubuntu.sh | bash - && apt-get install -y nodejs

Dockerfile.general_idea: Add verification steps for Node.js and npm installation.
Copy application source code and configuration files into the image.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The build process needs access to the source code and build configuration (pom.xml) to compile the application.
Dockerfile.after:
COPY src /home/app/src
COPY frontend /home/app/frontend
COPY lombok.config /home/app
COPY pom.xml /home/app

Dockerfile.general_idea: Add Maven build step to compile and package the application.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The application JAR must be built from source within the Docker image to create the executable artifact.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Replace the generic bash entrypoint with a specific command to run the compiled Java application.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The container needs to execute the application JAR on startup instead of just opening a shell.

dev_environment.general_idea: Rename the Docker image variable to reflect the new project name.

frontend/.storybook/main.js.general_idea: Migrate Storybook configuration from CommonJS module.exports to ES Module export default syntax.
frontend/.storybook/main.js.why_exists: Storybook 7+ and modern bundlers (Webpack 5) default to ESM; using CommonJS may cause module resolution errors or deprecation warnings in strict ESM environments.

frontend/.storybook/main.js.general_idea: Update storybook stories glob patterns to include .mdx and .mjs files and remove deprecated .stories.mdx specific pattern.
Add @storybook/addon-onboarding to the addons list for improved developer experience.
Add @chromatic-com/storybook addon for visual regression testing integration.
Add @storybook/addon-interactions to the addons list for interaction testing support.
Explicitly define the framework as @storybook/react-webpack5 in the configuration.
Add staticDirs configuration to serve static assets from the public directory.
Remove custom webpack plugin WebpackPluginFailBuildOnWarning from the configuration.
frontend/.storybook/main.js.before: webpackFinal: async (config) => { config.plugins.push(new WebpackPluginFailBuildOnWarning()); return config; }

frontend/.storybook/main.js.general_idea: Remove require statement for the custom webpack plugin that is no longer used.

frontend/.storybook/preview.js.general_idea: Add import for react-toastify CSS to support toast notifications in Storybook.
Add imports for msw-storybook-addon to enable Mock Service Worker in Storybook.
Add import for ToastContainer component from react-toastify.
Add logic to determine the correct URL for the Mock Service Worker script based on the environment.
Initialize the Mock Service Worker with the determined URL.
Wrap Story content with ToastContainer to render toast notifications.
Refactor Storybook preview configuration to use the modern default export object syntax.
Add mswLoader to the preview loaders to integrate Mock Service Worker with Storybook stories.

frontend/jsconfig.json.general_idea: Update baseUrl path to remove leading dot-slash for cleaner configuration.
Add include directive to explicitly scope the configuration to the src directory.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.4 to support Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline; upgrading is required to compile and run on JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property to 21 to align with the target JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Maven compiler plugin uses this property; leaving it at 17 prevents compilation of Java 21 features or causes warnings/errors depending on plugin config.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated Springfox Swagger dependencies with SpringDoc OpenAPI for Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Springfox is incompatible with Spring Boot 3 (Jakarta EE namespace changes); the application will fail to start or compile without a replacement API documentation library.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Cloud Gateway MVC to version 4.1.3 to align with Spring Boot 3 dependencies.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Spring Cloud versions are incompatible with Spring Boot 3's dependency management and Jakarta EE namespaces.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add javax.validation dependency to bridge legacy validation API usage during migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 moves to Jakarta EE (jakarta.validation); if code still references javax.validation, it will fail at runtime or compile time without this bridge or explicit dependency.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Node.js version in frontend-maven-plugin to v16.20.0 for better compatibility with modern build tools.
Add WireMock dependency for testing external service interactions.
Add Playwright dependency for browser-based integration testing.
Add Pitest mutation testing plugin configuration to the build.
Add Surefire plugin configuration to fix test execution issues.
Add explicit mainClass configuration to Spring Boot and Jar plugins.
Add new Maven profiles (wiremock, integration) for different testing environments.
Update artifact ID and name to reflect new project identity.
